requirement_topic.en: UN 38.3 and IEC 62281 Transport Safety — mandatory for lithium battery imports via all modes
requirement_topic.zh: UN 38.3和IEC 62281运输安全——所有运输方式进口锂电池的强制要求
requirement_topic.zht: UN 38.3和IEC 62281運輸安全——所有運輸方式進口鋰電池的強制要求

summary.en: Eswatini is a landlocked country in Southern Africa. All BESS imports must transit through neighbouring countries (primarily South Africa, Mozambique) before delivery. The most common import routes involve sea freight to South African ports (Durban, Port Elizabeth, or Cape Town) followed by road transport through South Africa into Eswatini. UN 38.3 (Recommendations on the Transport of Dangerous Goods, Test and Criteria, Part III, Section 38.3) mandates safety testing (T1–T8) for all lithium cells and batteries transported by any mode — air (IATA DGR), sea (IMDG Code), or road (ADR/SADC-aligned road regulations). A UN 38.3 Test Summary is mandatory for all lithium battery shipments and has been required since 1 January 2020. IEC 62281:2019 (Safety of primary and secondary lithium cells and batteries during transport) provides complementary transport packaging and condition standards. Eswatini does not itself issue any exemption from UN 38.3 or IMDG requirements — compliance is governed by the international transport conventions applied by the carrier and port/border authorities of each transit country.
summary.zh: 埃斯瓦蒂尼是南部非洲的内陆国家。所有BESS进口须途经邻国（主要是南非、莫桑比克）后方可交付。最常见的进口路线为海运至南非港口（德班、伊丽莎白港或开普敦），再经南非公路运输进入埃斯瓦蒂尼。UN 38.3（危险货物运输建议书，试验和标准，第三部分第38.3节）要求对所有通过任何方式——航空（IATA DGR）、海运（IMDG规则）或公路（ADR/SADC对应公路法规）——运输的锂电池和蓄电池进行安全测试（T1–T8）。UN 38.3测试摘要对所有锂电池货运为强制要求，自2020年1月1日起执行。IEC 62281:2019（一次和二次锂电池在运输过程中的安全）提供补充性运输包装和状态标准。埃斯瓦蒂尼本身不对UN 38.3或IMDG要求给予豁免——合规性由承运人及各过境国港口/边境主管机构适用的国际运输公约管理。
summary.zht: 埃斯瓦蒂尼是南部非洲的內陸國家。所有BESS進口須途經鄰國（主要是南非、莫桑比克）後方可交付。最常見的進口路線為海運至南非港口（德班、伊麗莎白港或開普敦），再經南非公路運輸進入埃斯瓦蒂尼。UN 38.3（危險貨物運輸建議書，試驗和標準，第三部分第38.3節）要求對所有通過任何方式——航空（IATA DGR）、海運（IMDG規則）或公路（ADR/SADC對應公路法規）——運輸的鋰電池和蓄電池進行安全測試（T1–T8）。UN 38.3測試摘要對所有鋰電池貨運為強制要求，自2020年1月1日起執行。IEC 62281:2019（一次和二次鋰電池在運輸過程中的安全）提供補充性運輸包裝和狀態標準。埃斯瓦蒂尼本身不對UN 38.3或IMDG要求給予豁免——合規性由承運人及各過境國港口/邊境主管機構適用的國際運輸公約管理。

standards_or_laws: UN 38.3 — Recommendations on the Transport of Dangerous Goods, Test and Criteria, Part III, Section 38.3 (T1–T8 tests)
IATA Dangerous Goods Regulations (DGR) — applicable for any air leg
IMDG Code (International Maritime Dangerous Goods Code) — applicable for sea freight via South African ports
ADR (European Agreement concerning the International Carriage of Dangerous Goods by Road) — applicable for road legs in SADC-aligned context
IEC 62281:2019 (Safety of primary and secondary lithium cells and batteries during transport)

summary.en: Chinese BESS and lithium battery manufacturers typically hold UN 38.3 test summaries issued by CNAS-accredited or ILAC-member laboratories (including UL, SGS, Bureau Veritas, TÜV, CAICT). Chinese-origin UN 38.3 test summaries from properly accredited laboratories are accepted for international transport into Eswatini via South African ports and road crossings — this is not a standards equivalence gap but a documentation currency and scope gap. The key risks are: (a) the test summary must exactly cover the specific cell model, chemistry, capacity, and format being shipped in this consignment; (b) the issuing laboratory must still hold current accreditation; (c) any cell design change after testing requires a new UN 38.3 assessment before the modified cell can be shipped; (d) module and pack assemblies may require separate UN 38.3 assessment in addition to cell-level testing; (e) state-of-charge limits and packaging requirements under IEC 62281 and IMDG must be met for the specific shipment configuration.
summary.zh: 中国BESS和锂电池制造商通常持有CNAS认可或ILAC成员实验室（包括UL、SGS、必维国际检验集团、TÜV、中国泰尔实验室）出具的UN 38.3测试摘要。来自正规认可实验室的中国原产UN 38.3测试摘要被接受用于经南非港口及公路口岸进入埃斯瓦蒂尼的国际运输——这不是标准等效差距，而是文件时效性和适用范围差距。主要风险包括：（a）测试摘要须准确覆盖本次货运的具体电芯型号、化学体系、容量和规格；（b）出具机构须仍持有有效认可资质；（c）测试后任何电芯设计变更在发运改型电芯前均需进行新的UN 38.3评估；（d）模组和电池包总成可能除电芯级测试外还需单独进行UN 38.3评估；（e）须满足IEC 62281和IMDG对特定货运配置的荷电状态限制和包装要求。
summary.zht: 中國BESS和鋰電池製造商通常持有CNAS認可或ILAC成員實驗室（包括UL、SGS、必維國際檢驗集團、TÜV、中國泰爾實驗室）出具的UN 38.3測試摘要。來自正規認可實驗室的中國原產UN 38.3測試摘要被接受用於經南非港口及公路口岸進入埃斯瓦蒂尼的國際運輸——這不是標準等效差距，而是文件時效性和適用範圍差距。主要風險包括：（a）測試摘要須準確覆蓋本次貨運的具體電芯型號、化學體系、容量和規格；（b）出具機構須仍持有有效認可資質；（c）測試後任何電芯設計變更在發運改型電芯前均需進行新的UN 38.3評估；（d）模組和電池包總成可能除電芯級測試外還需單獨進行UN 38.3評估；（e）須滿足IEC 62281和IMDG對特定貨運配置的荷電狀態限制和包裝要求。

standards_or_laws: UN 38.3 test summaries from CNAS-accredited or ILAC-member laboratories
GB/T 28539-2012 (Safety requirements for transportation of lithium primary battery — Chinese domestic reference only)

gap.en: DOCUMENTATION SCOPE AND CURRENCY GAP (not a standard equivalence gap). Chinese UN 38.3 test summaries from accredited laboratories are accepted for international transport through South Africa into Eswatini. However, exporters must: (1) confirm the test summary on file covers the exact cell model, chemistry, capacity, and format in this specific shipment — mismatches are a common compliance failure; (2) verify the issuing laboratory's accreditation is still current; (3) obtain a new UN 38.3 assessment for any cell design change since the last test; (4) consider whether the module or pack assembly needs its own UN 38.3 assessment in addition to the cell-level test; (5) comply with IMDG Code state-of-charge limits (typically ≤30% for lithium-ion) and packaging standards (UN performance packaging); (6) engage a dangerous-goods freight forwarder with experience on the China–South Africa–Eswatini road corridor, familiar with Durban Port IMDG requirements and SADC road transport DG rules; (7) prepare IATA DGR-compliant documentation for any air freight legs.
gap.zh: 文件时效性和范围差距（非标准等效差距）。来自认可实验室的中国UN 38.3测试摘要被接受用于经南非进入埃斯瓦蒂尼的国际运输。但出口商须：（1）确认存档的测试摘要覆盖本次具体货运中的确切电芯型号、化学体系、容量和规格——不符是常见的合规失误；（2）核实出具机构的认可资质仍然有效；（3）自上次测试以来任何电芯设计变更均须获得新的UN 38.3评估；（4）考虑模组或电池包总成是否需要在电芯级测试之外进行独立的UN 38.3评估；（5）遵守IMDG规则的荷电状态限制（锂离子通常≤30%）和包装标准（UN性能包装）；（6）聘请熟悉中国—南非—埃斯瓦蒂尼公路走廊、德班港IMDG要求及SADC公路运输危险货物法规的危险货物货运代理；（7）为任何航空运输段准备符合IATA DGR的文件。
gap.zht: 文件時效性和範圍差距（非標準等效差距）。來自認可實驗室的中國UN 38.3測試摘要被接受用於經南非進入埃斯瓦蒂尼的國際運輸。但出口商須：（1）確認存檔的測試摘要覆蓋本次具體貨運中的確切電芯型號、化學體系、容量和規格——不符是常見的合規失誤；（2）核實出具機構的認可資質仍然有效；（3）自上次測試以來任何電芯設計變更均須獲得新的UN 38.3評估；（4）考慮模組或電池包總成是否需要在電芯級測試之外進行獨立的UN 38.3評估；（5）遵守IMDG規則的荷電狀態限制（鋰離子通常≤30%）和包裝標準（UN性能包裝）；（6）聘請熟悉中國—南非—埃斯瓦蒂尼公路走廊、德班港IMDG要求及SADC公路運輸危險貨物法規的危險貨物貨運代理；（7）為任何航空運輸段準備符合IATA DGR的文件。

mandatory_status.target: UN 38.3 Test Summary mandatory under IATA DGR, IMDG Code, and SADC-aligned road DG regulations — no Eswatini exemption; IEC 62281 compliance required for packaging and transport conditions
mandatory_status.cn: UN 38.3 testing mandatory for export of lithium cells and batteries; test summaries required from accredited laboratories

source.publisher: UNECE — United Nations Economic Commission for Europe (Transport of Dangerous Goods)

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] UN 38.3 test summaries from CNAS-accredited or ILAC-member laboratories are accepted for shipments transiting South African ports and roads into Eswatini. This is a documentation currency and scope gap, not a standards equivalence gap. Exporters must ensure test summaries exactly match the shipped cell model and format, verify laboratory accreditation is current, and engage a DG-experienced freight forwarder for the China–Durban–Eswatini corridor before shipment.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 来自CNAS认可或ILAC成员实验室的UN 38.3测试摘要被接受用于经南非港口和公路运输至埃斯瓦蒂尼的货运。这是文件时效性和范围差距，而非标准等效差距。出口商须确保测试摘要与发运电芯型号和规格完全一致，核实实验室认可资质仍然有效，并在发货前为中国—德班—埃斯瓦蒂尼走廊聘请具有危险货物经验的货运代理。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 來自CNAS認可或ILAC成員實驗室的UN 38.3測試摘要被接受用於經南非港口和公路運輸至埃斯瓦蒂尼的貨運。這是文件時效性和範圍差距，而非標準等效差距。出口商須確保測試摘要與發運電芯型號和規格完全一致，核實實驗室認可資質仍然有效，並在發貨前為中國—德班—埃斯瓦蒂尼走廊聘請具有危險貨物經驗的貨運代理。
